acceptance_criteria.given: changelog-analyst is run with BULK=false and detects nothing_to_commit_precommitted (candidate set empty, HEAD~N..HEAD contains an auto-bulk commit intersecting task_cycle_files)
acceptance_criteria.then: git log HEAD -1 --format='%s' shows a subject containing TASK_ID but not starting with 'auto-bulk:'; git show HEAD --stat shows empty diff; push-gate token file exists at expected path; structured output contains commit_status: committed
output starts with 'auto-bulk:' — prior bulk commit SHA unchanged, it is HEAD~1
body contains 'Task-id: <TASK_ID>', at least one 'Precommitted-by: <sha>' line, and an 'Attributed-files:' block with at least one file path from dev-report files_modified or files_created
commit_sha field equals git rev-parse HEAD (the recovery commit); token is valid JSON

acceptance_criteria.given: both root and nested repo have nothing_to_commit_precommitted detected; commands/commit.md Step 5 wrote two commit grants
acceptance_criteria.then: two recovery commits created (one per repo); both push-gate tokens written; commit_status: committed returned; no grant_missing or grant_expired failure in structured output

acceptance_criteria.given: only nested repo has precommitted content; root repo has normal staged changes
acceptance_criteria.then: root repo gets a normal real commit (non-empty diff); nested repo gets a recovery commit (empty diff with attribution); both push-gate tokens written; commit_status: committed

acceptance_criteria.given: recovery path detects precommitted state but git commit --allow-empty fails (hook blocked or git error)
acceptance_criteria.then: structured output contains commit_status: failed; failure_code is 'hook_blocked' or 'git_error'; failure_reason mentions precommitted recovery context

acceptance_criteria.given: normal /commit <task-id> run where working tree has staged changes (no precommit situation)
acceptance_criteria.then: behavior is identical to pre-change — real diff-based commit created; recovery path never entered; commit_status: committed with non-empty diff stat
